name: @clean99/liquid-glass
description: Refractive Liquid Glass components for React, built on @hashintel/refractive with accessible fallbacks.
author: Koh Hom

scripts.test:a11y: pnpm build && rm -rf storybook-static-a11y && storybook build --quiet --output-dir storybook-static-a11y && STORYBOOK_STATIC_DIR=storybook-static-a11y node scripts/verify-storybook-a11y.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf storybook-static-a11y; exit $status
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build && rm -rf storybook-static-e2e && storybook build --quiet --output-dir storybook-static-e2e && STORYBOOK_STATIC_DIR=storybook-static-e2e node scripts/verify-liquid-behavior.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf storybook-static-e2e; exit $status
scripts.test:kube-reference: pnpm build && rm -rf storybook-static-kube-reference && storybook build --quiet --output-dir storybook-static-kube-reference && STORYBOOK_STATIC_DIR=storybook-static-kube-reference node scripts/compare-kube-reference.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf storybook-static-kube-reference; exit $status
scripts.test:storybook: pnpm build && rm -rf storybook-static-contracts && storybook build --quiet --output-dir storybook-static-contracts && STORYBOOK_STATIC_DIR=storybook-static-contracts node scripts/verify-enhanced-storybook.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf storybook-static-contracts; exit $status
scripts.ci: pnpm format && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:docs && pnpm test:inventory && pnpm test:registry && pnpm test:shadcn-parity && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:components && pnpm test:physics && pnpm test:storybook && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm test:a11y && pnpm build && pnpm test:package
scripts.verify: pnpm run ci && pnpm test:visual && pnpm test:kube-reference && pnpm pack --dry-run
